form.formComment: At the latest run 19th of 23 at Curragh on March 15 over 1609m, on heavy track; 48 len behind Victory Tip with 57kg at $251. The run before that 9th of 13 at Dundalk All Weather on January 23 over 1408m, 10 len behind Flanker Jet with 59.5kg at $251. Likely to go around at long odds again.

The run before that 9th of 13 at Dundalk All Weather on January 23 over 1408m, 10 len behind Flanker Jet with 59.5kg at $251. Likely to go around at long odds again.

form.formComment: Jumped at very long odds at debut, 8th of 10 at Curragh on March 28 over 2011m, 21 len behind Shaihaan carrying 61kg at $151. Won't find this any easier so he must improve sharply.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: In Weaker Class FS(-8.5). Jumped at very long odds at debut, 8th of 10 at Curragh on March 28 over 2011m, 21 len behind Shaihaan carrying 61kg at $151. Won't find this any easier so he must improve sharply.

form.formComment: Third race start. Promising on debut 2nd of 9 at Leopardstown on October 18 over 1408m, 0.8 len behind Unauthorized with 59.5kg at $11. Returned from break 3rd of 13 at Navan on March 30 over 2011m, on a wet track; 4.5 len behind Sir Benji carrying 61kg at $6. Fitter and is a leading contender.

form.formComment: At debut, 3rd of 12 at Dundalk All Weather on February 13 over 1609m, 8 len behind Heartbeat Supreme carrying 61kg at $23. Shaping up well and worth following.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: In Equal Class FS(-1). At debut, 3rd of 12 at Dundalk All Weather on February 13 over 1609m, 8 len behind Heartbeat Supreme carrying 61kg at $23. Shaping up well and worth following.

form.formComment: Was at very long odds at debut, 7th of 14 at Dundalk All Weather on March 6 over 1609m, 7 len behind Son Of Beauty carrying 61kg at $126. Doubt he will trouble these.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: In Stronger Class FS(3.5). Was at very long odds at debut, 7th of 14 at Dundalk All Weather on March 6 over 1609m, 7 len behind Son Of Beauty carrying 61kg at $126. Doubt he will trouble these.

form.formComment: Was as a despised roughie at debut, 6th of 15 at Navan on March 30 over 1609m, on heavy track; 10 len behind Shaftesbury Avenue carrying 59.5kg at $81. Others look better prospects.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: In Weaker Class FS(-2). Was as a despised roughie at debut, 6th of 15 at Navan on March 30 over 1609m, on heavy track; 10 len behind Shaftesbury Avenue carrying 59.5kg at $81. Others look better prospects.

form.formComment: Gelding back from a spell of six months. Has placed previously first up from a break. Finished off last campaign third of 14 at Dundalk All Weather October 10 over 1408m, 2.75 len behind Jungle Ruler with 61kg at $5.50. First up last campaign third in a small field at Tipperary in the LR August 8 over 1508m, 1.5 len behind Thesecretadversary with 59.5kg at $19. Great chance.

First up last campaign third in a small field at Tipperary in the LR August 8 over 1508m, 1.5 len behind Thesecretadversary with 59.5kg at $19. Great chance.

form.formComment: Third-up today. First-up 6th of 23 at Curragh on March 15 over 1609m, in the wet; 11 len behind Victory Tip with 59.5kg at $7. Second-up 5th of 13 at Curragh on March 28 over 1408m, 7 len behind Lewis Carroll with 60kg at $9. Looks ready to win.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: In Weaker Class FS(-2.5). Third-up today. First-up 6th of 23 at Curragh on March 15 over 1609m, in the wet; 11 len behind Victory Tip with 59.5kg at $7. Second-up 5th of 13 at Curragh on March 28 over 1408m, 7 len behind Lewis Carroll with 60kg at $9. Looks ready to win.

form.formComment: First-starter by Coulsty out of Love Is The Key. Hard to recommend without a market push.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: In Equal Class FS(0). First-starter by Coulsty out of Love Is The Key. Hard to recommend without a market push.

form.formComment: Resuming from a lengthy break. Only one run when ran last of 14 at Cork on July 25 over 1005m, 14 len behind Rosie Frith with 53kg at $19. Others preferred.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: In Equal Class FS(-0.5). Resuming from a lengthy break. Only one run when ran last of 14 at Cork on July 25 over 1005m, 14 len behind Rosie Frith with 53kg at $19. Others preferred.

form.formComment: Is first-up after a break of five-and-a-half months and has been in the money when fresh before. Finished off last campaign second of 10 at Galway October 27 over 1709m, 4 len behind Classiest carrying 56.5kg at $5.50. First up last campaign seventh of 14 at Dundalk All Weather October 10 over 1408m, 8 len behind All The Girls carrying 55kg at $3. Expecting a bright start to the campaign.

form.formComment: Resuming. Finished off last preparation 6th of 12 at Dundalk All Weather on December 12 over 1408m, 4.5 len behind Liberation Date carrying 55kg at $6.50. First up last campaign 5th of 14 at Dundalk All Weather on October 10 over 1408m, 6 len behind All The Girls carrying 56kg at $6.50. Sure to be prominent.

form.formComment: Second-up. First start 10th of 12 at Dundalk All Weather on December 12 over 1408m, 18 len behind Gonna Be Golden with 55kg at $67. form.formComment: Back from a spell. Only had one start last campaign 5th of 13 at Dundalk All Weather on January 23 over 1408m, 7 len behind River Of Life carrying 58.5kg at $13. When resuming last campaign 6th of 11 at Gowran Park on October 20 over 1709m, on rain affected going; 7 len behind Marjorie Daw with 56kg at $21. One of the chances.
